# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework Access Key.
org: stelioszlat
service: pdfshare-serverless

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  stage: dev
  profile: default
  region: eu-north-1
  timeout: 20
  environment:
    MONGO_URI: mongodb+srv://stelioszlat:ntERINguANdweSc@pdfcluster.0iyo1.mongodb.net/metadata?retryWrites=true&w=majority
    SECRET: alksdjfhasdkfhjaskdhf

functions:
  getMetadata:
    handler: ./handlers/metadata-handler.getMetadata
    events:
      - http:
          path: files
          method: get
  addMetadata:
    handler: ./handlers/metadata-handler.addMetadata
    events:
      - http:
          path: files/new
          method: post
  getMetadataByUserId:
    handler: ./handlers/metadata-handler.getMetadataByUserId
    events:
      - http:
          path: files/user/{userId}
          method: get
  getMetadataById:
    handler: ./handlers/metadata-handler.getMetadataById
    events:
      - http:
          path: file/{fileId}
          method: get
  deleteMetadata:
    handler: ./handlers/metadata-handler.deleteMetadata
    events: 
      - http:
          path: file/{fileId}
          method: delete
  getUsers:
    handler: ./handlers/user-handler.getUsers
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/user/all
          method: get
  createUser:
    handler: ./handlers/user-handler.createUser
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/user
          method: post
  getUserById:
    handler: ./handlers/user-handler.getUserById
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/user/{userId}
          method: get
  updateUserById:
    handler: ./handlers/user-handler.updateUserById
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/user/{userId}
          method: put
  deleteUserById:
    handler: ./handlers/user-handler.deleteUserById
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/user/{userId}
          method: delete
  login:
    handler: ./handlers/auth-handler.login
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/login
          method: post
  logout:
    handler: ./handlers/auth-handler.logout
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/logout
          method: post
  reset:
    handler: ./handlers/auth-handler.reset
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/reset
          method: post
  getTokens:
    handler: ./handlers/auth-handler.getTokens
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/token/all
          method: get
  createToken:
    handler: ./handlers/auth-handler.createToken
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/token/{tokenId}
          method: post
  getTokenById:
    handler: ./handlers/auth-handler.getTokenById
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/token/{tokenId}
          method: get
  register:
    handler: ./handlers/auth-handler.register
    events:
      - http:
          path: auth/register
          method: post
  upload:
    handler: ./handlers/upload-handler.upload
    events:
      - http:
          path: extra/upload
          method: post
  download:
    handler: ./handlers/upload-handler.download
    events:
      - http:
          path: extra/download
          method: get 
plugins:
  - serverless-offline
  - serverless-package
